---
name: Bug report
about: Broken citation, stale file:line, drifted CF number, factual error in the corpus
title: "bug: "
labels: bug
---

## Where

Path of the doc with the problem (e.g. `knowledge/subsystems/storage-buffer.md`):

## What's wrong

One or two sentences. If it's a broken citation, quote the offending line
verbatim.

## Expected `source/<path>:<line>`

For citation bugs, paste the actual upstream cite that should be there
(or write "unknown" if you've only spotted the breakage).

## Upstream commit (if known)

The `source/` clone may have moved since the doc was written. If you
know which upstream commit caused the drift, drop the SHA here.
